description_long: This is a standard-sized spoon with a gently curved, oval-shaped bowl and a long, slender handle. The handle features subtle ridges for grip and tapers slightly toward the end, which is rounded and may have a small hole for hanging. The entire object has a uniform, dark coloration, likely indicating a metal or high-quality plastic construction. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. There are no visible embellishments or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance. The spoon is free from visible wear, scratches, or dents, suggesting it is either new or well-maintained.
description: A sleek, dark-colored spoon with a smooth, oval bowl and a long, ridged handle, featuring a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bowl and the handle extending directly away from the viewer.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the shallow curvature of the bowl and the slender, straight handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bowl and the handle, with the end of the handle visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the bowl's depth and the handle's length.
attribute_orientation: bowl facing upward, handle extending away from the viewer
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a surface or nested with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with similar spoons
